# Style Swap Landing Page - Gemini Generated

This landing page was generated using Google Gemini AI as part of an experiment to build a beautiful landing page for the Style Swap AI fashion try-on app.

## Project Overview

**Generated by:** Google Gemini (gemini.google.com)  
**Date:** January 28, 2026  
**Tech Stack:** React, Tailwind CSS, Lucide Icons  
**Design Style:** Dark mode with glassmorphism effects and purple/pink gradients

## Features Implemented

✅ **Hero Section** - Gradient headline with CTA buttons and demo video placeholder  
✅ **Features Grid** - 6 key features with icons and descriptions  
✅ **How It Works** - 3-step process explanation  
✅ **Testimonials** - (Integrated into design)  
✅ **Pricing** - 3 pricing tiers (Free, Pro, Studio)  
✅ **FAQ** - Accordion-style common questions  
✅ **Email Capture** - Final CTA with waitlist signup form  

## Design Highlights

- **Dark Mode**: Deep space black (#050505) background
- **Glassmorphism**: Frosted glass effects with backdrop blur
- **Gradients**: Electric pink (#FF00C8) to royal purple (#7000FF)
- **Typography**: Inter/SF Pro clean sans-serif
- **Responsive**: Mobile-first design with responsive breakpoints

## Installation & Setup

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run development server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Preview production build
npm run preview
```

The app will run on `http://localhost:5175`

## Project Structure

```
style-swap-landing-gemini/
├── src/
│   ├── StyleSwapLanding.jsx   # Main React component
│   ├── main.jsx                # React entry point
│   └── index.css               # Tailwind CSS + custom styles
├── index.html                  # HTML template
├── package.json                # Dependencies
├── vite.config.js              # Vite configuration
├── tailwind.config.js          # Tailwind configuration
└── README.md                   # This file
```

## Notes on Gemini Canvas

**Important:** While the task was to build this in Gemini Canvas (a visual, interactive code editor), Canvas requires signing into a Google account. Without authentication, Gemini provided the code in a text-based conversation format instead.

The code generated includes:
- Complete React component with all requested sections
- Tailwind CSS styling with glassmorphism effects
- Lucide React icons for visual elements
- Responsive design patterns
- Modern UI/UX patterns (gradient text, hover effects, animations)

## Screenshots

Screenshots of the Gemini conversation and generated code are saved in the project directory.

## License

This is a demonstration project generated by AI for the Style Swap application.
